channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Lords of the Fallen sales top 2.5 million
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Sequel due out in 2026.

Total sales for the 2023-released action RPG Lords of the Fallen have surpassed 2.5 million copies as of the end of February, publisher CI Games and developer Hexworks announced.

Lords of the Fallen launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store on October 13, 2023.

A sequel, Lords of the Fallen II, is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Epic Games Store in 2026.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/lords-of-the-fallen-sales-top-2-5-million
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Crimson Desert sales top two million
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Milestone achieved one day after released.

Total sales for open-world action adventure game Crimson Desert have surpassed two million units just one day after release, developer Pearl Abyss announced.

“We are incredibly humbled to share that Crimson Desert has sold through two million copies worldwide,” Pearl Abyss said. “Thank you so much to our fans, community, and everyone who has joined us in Pywel. We will listen closely to the wide range of feedback shared by the community and work to make improvements quickly, doing our utmost to make the journey ahead even more enjoyable for our players.”

Crimson Desert launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store on March 19.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/crimson-desert-sales-top-two-million
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Momotaro Dentetsu 2: Anata no Machi mo Kitto Aru – Higashi Nihon Hen + Nishi Nihon Hen shipments and digital sales top one million
item.content:encoded:
• Switch
  • Switch 2

At least 595,247 units sold physically.

Total shipments and digital sales for Momotaro Dentetsu 2: Anata no Machi mo Kitto Aru – Higashi Nihon Hen + Nishi Nihon Hen have surpassed one million units, according to series creator Akira Sakuma.

Momotaro Dentetsu 2: Anata no Machi mo Kitto Aru – Higashi Nihon Hen + Nishi Nihon Hen launched for Switch 2 and Switch on November 13, 2025 in Japan. According to the latest Famitsu sales, the physical edition has sold at least 595,247 units.

The previous game, Momotaro Dentetsu World: Chikyuu wa Kibou de Mawatteru!, reached 1.5 million units by just over a year after launch. And the game before that, Momotaro Dentetsu: Showa, Heisei, Reiwa mo Teiban!, surpassed four million units in just under three years.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/momotaro-dentetsu-2-anata-no-machi-mo-kitto-aru-higashi-nihon-hen-nishi-nihon-hen-shipments-and-digital-sales-top-one-million
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
